Part.Source: Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &InvEmpCod.Visible = False &ProCod.Visible = False &ProGraCod.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName &ActionGroup1Data = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem.Title = 'Exportar Excel' &ActionGroup1DataItem.Icon = ActionExport.Link() &ActionGroup1DataItem.EventKey = !'Export' &ActionGroup1DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup1Data.Add(&ActionGroup1DataItem) &ActionGroup1DataItem = new() &ActionGroup1DataItem.Title = 'Exportar PDF' &ActionGroup1DataItem.Icon = ActionExportReport.Link() &ActionGroup1DataItem.EventKey = !'ExportReport' &ActionGroup1DataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionGroup1Data.Add(&ActionGroup1DataItem) &FilInvEmpCod = &InvEmpCod &FilInvFilCod = &InvFilCod &FilInvAno = &InvAno &FilInvMes = &InvMes DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Inventario' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Ordem Referência') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Ordem Nome') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Ref.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Unt.Custo') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'Qtd.Inventário') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, 'Qtd.Atual') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Grupo') &OrderedBy.AddItem(8, 'Grupo Nome') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &FilInvEmpCod = &InvEmpCOd &FilInvFilCod = &InvFilCod &FilInvAno = &InvAno &FilInvMes = &InvMes EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' Do 'InitializeTotalizers' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount Do 'CalculateTotalizers' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Remover = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Enter do 'gravar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSair' wpinventariosped.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInicializar' wpInicializarInventario.Popup(&InvEmpCOd, &InvFilCod, &InvAno, &InvMes) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_ActionGroup1.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_ActionGroup1.ActiveEventKey = !'Export' Do 'DoExport' Case ddo_ActionGroup1.ActiveEventKey = !'ExportReport' Do 'DoExportReport' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' // if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILTERFULLTEXT" &FilterFullText.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILINVEMPCOD" &FilInvEmpCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILINVFILCOD" &FilInvFilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILINVANO" &FilInvAno.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILINVMES" &FilInvMes.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ // Endif EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' // if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILTERFULLTEXT", "", not &FilterFullText.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilterFullText, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILINVEMPCOD", "", true, 0, &FilInvEmpCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILINVFILCOD", "", true, 0, &FilInvFilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILINVANO", "", true, 0, &FilInvAno.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILINVMES", "", true, 0, &FilInvMes.ToString().Trim(), '') &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ // Endif EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Inventario" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportwpInventarioItens.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportwpInventarioItens.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeTotalizers' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TotInvProGraRef = 0 &TotInvProQtd = 0 &TotInvProVlrCusTot = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'CalculateTotalizers' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ For Each Inventario.Produtos using DSwpInventarioItens(&FilterFullText, &FilInvEmpCod, &FilInvFilCod, &FilInvAno, &FilInvMes) &TotInvProQtd = InvProQtd + &TotInvProQtd &TotInvProVlrCusTot = InvProVlrCusTot + &TotInvProVlrCusTot EndFor &TotInvProGraRef = Grid.RecordCount &TotValueInvProGraRef = "WWP_TotalizerCount" + &TotInvProGraRef.ToFormattedString() &TotValueInvProQtd = &TotInvProQtd.ToFormattedString() &TotValueInvProVlrCusTot = &TotInvProVlrCusTot.ToFormattedString() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event 'F3' 3 do 'Gravar' EndEvent Event &InvProGraRef.IsValid RetornaProdutoReferencia.Call(&InvEmpCOd, &InvProGraRef, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &ProNom, &IsAchouProduto, &ProReqVlr, &ProReqQtd, &ProBarQTd, &erroMensagem) do 'GetLancamentoInventario' EndEvent Event &InvProQtd.IsValid if &IsNovo = true and &InvProQtdAtu.IsEmpty() &InvProQtdAtu = &InvProQtd endif EndEvent Event &Remover.Click prcDeletaItemInventario.Call(InvEmpCod, InvFilCod, InvAno, InvMes, InvProCod, InvProGraCod) Refresh EndEvent Sub 'Gravar' RetornaProdutoReferencia.Call(&InvEmpCOd, &InvProGraRef, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &ProNom, &IsAchouProduto, &ProReqVlr, &ProReqQtd, &ProBarQTd, &erroMensagem) if &IsAchouProduto = true prcGravaItemInventario.Call(&InvEmpCOd, &InvFilCod, &InvAno, &InvMes, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &InvProQtd, &InvProQtdAtu, &InvProVlrCus) &InvProQtd = 0 &InvProQtdAtu = 0 &InvProQtd = 0 &InvProQtdAtu = 0 &InvProVlrCus = 0 &InvProVlrCusTot = 0 &ProNom = '' Grid.Refresh() Else msg('Produto não Localizado!') Endif &InvProGraRef.SetFocus() EndSub Sub 'GetLancamentoInventario' &InvProQtd = 0 &InvProQtdAtu = 0 &InvProQtd = 0 &InvProQtdAtu = 0 &InvProVlrCus = 0 &InvProVlrCusTot = 0 &ProNom = '' &IsNovo = false For Each Order InvEmpCod, InvFilCod, InvAno, InvMes, InvProCod, InvProGraCod Where InvEmpCod = &InvEmpCOd where InvFilCod = &InvFilCod where InvAno = &InvAno where InvMes = &InvMes where InvProCod = &ProCod where InvProGraCod = &ProGraCod &InvProQtd = InvProQtd &InvProQtdAtu = InvProQtdAtu &InvProVlrCus = InvProVlrCus &InvProVlrCusTot = InvProVlrCusTot &ProNom = '' Exit When None &IsNovo = true For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod Where EmpCod = &InvEmpCOd Where ProCod = &ProCod Where ProGraCod = &ProGraCod &ProNom = ProNomGra &InvProVlrCus = ProVlrCus For Each Estoque Order EmpCod, FilCod, ProCod, ProGraCod Where FilCod = &InvFilCod if EstQtd > 0 &InvProQtd = EstQtd &InvProQtdAtu = &InvProQtd Endif Exit EndFor EndFor EndFor EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
